title: PARENT-ACTIVITY (15s) — Papa lunges, slips on a ketchup packet, tackle-hug from girls
prompt: Wide cinematic comedy shot in @backyard, green grass, leafy backyard tree, black iron fence, sunny afternoon. @Papa already CENTER-FRAME in the foreground in the grass, wearing @papas-apron, in a dramatic mid-lunge pose chasing after a now-OFF-SCREEN tail-wagging escape, both arms outstretched in classic comic-pursuit form. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa's leading foot SLIPS sideways on a tiny SEALED unopened SHINY-FOIL PURPLE KETCHUP PACKET lying flat in the grass (the packet stays SEALED and INTACT throughout the entire clip — it skitters one inch away as his foot slides, the packet remains fully closed, fully sealed, fully whole at all times). Papa's leg shoots forward in slapstick slow-motion, both arms windmill cartoonishly in the air. Papa's eyes go saucer-wide, mouth in a perfect surprised 'O'. Papa (theatrical slow-motion shout, big and silly): "OH NO-OOOOO-OOOO!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Papa face-plants GENTLY into the soft springy grass with arms still outstretched. The apron stays its normal CHARCOAL-GREY canvas color — no stains, no marks, no liquid, no red anywhere. Head turns sideways with a goofy defeated dad expression. He blows a single small blade of grass off his lips with a tiny puff. Papa (muffled, into the grass, defeated and silly): "...I'll just live here now. This is my home." (BEAT 3 — 10-15s) @Sara already kneeling on the LEFT side of Papa in the grass close to his shoulder, both arms already wrapped around his upper arm in a hug, giggling uncontrollably. @Eva already kneeling on the RIGHT side of Papa close to his other shoulder, both arms already wrapped around his other arm in a hug, also giggling uncontrollably. The three are already in a cuddly tangle in the grass, all three giggling in a heap. Sara (squeezing his shoulders): "It's okay Papa! We still LOVE you, dream-cooker!" Eva (kissing the top of his head): "You're our FAVORITE okayest dad in the WHOLE WORLD!" Papa lets out a long surrendered laugh. Cheerful kid-show comedy lighting, clean and warm. The apron front and grass remain visually clean throughout — no marks, no spills, no stains, no liquid of any kind in this clip.
